projectDescription: A personal portfolio and blog site for Nsengiyumva Eric, a full-stack developer specializing in backend engineering with Node.js, TypeScript, and NestJS.
keyFeatures: Responsive portfolio with sticky sidebar navigation
Dark/light mode toggle with smooth transitions
Animated skill proficiency indicators across four skill groups
Project showcase with detailed project pages
Integrated DevNotes blog with category filtering and search
Blog post detail overlay with syntax-highlighted code blocks
publicApiSurface: Route: / — Home page (About, Experience, Projects, Contact sections)
Route: /blog — Blog listing with category filter and search
Component: Sidebar — Sticky navigation with social links and theme toggle
Component: MobileHeader — Responsive top bar for mobile viewports
Component: About — Bio and skill proficiency grid
Data: skillGroups — Four skill categories with proficiency levels
Data: projects — Showcased projects with metadata
Data: POSTS (Blog) — Seven blog posts across Backend, Frontend, DevOps, Career categories
